Broadcom Expects Decade-Long AI Chip Boom as Big Tech Invest Billions
data.description: Broadcom chief Tan expects AI frenzy to continue for at least 10 years as Google, Meta Platforms, TikTok parent ByteDance invest in custom processors

data.title: FDA Approves Ionis Pharmaceuticals' Rare Genetic Disease Therapy to Lower High-Level Of Fat In Blood
data.description: Ionis' Tryngolza receives FDA approval for familial chylomicronemia syndrome, showing significant triglyceride reduction and fewer pancreatitis events.

Why Is Bioengineered Human Tissue-Focused Humacyte Stock Surging On Friday?
data.description: Humacyte's Symvess earns FDA approval as a first-in-class bioengineered vascular solution for urgent arterial injury repair in trauma cases.
